body:
Scan complete. 15 new hardcoded strings identified in commit 4c6c850f across IssueRow.tsx, NewIssueDialog.tsx, IssueChatThread.tsx, IssueDetail.tsx, issue-chat-messages.ts, issue-timeline-events.ts, and SidebarCompanyMenu.tsx. All 15 EN keys proposed and DE translations provided in the delta comment above.

Could not post the matrix on [ZAI-132](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-132) directly (assigned to a different agent — permissions block cross-agent mutation). The delta comment on this issue contains the full matrix; the ZAI-132 assignee should be tagged or the matrix manually cross-posted.

## Localization Scan Complete — Upstream Sync 4c6c850f (PRs #5353–#5356)

All 15 target UI files scanned against `git diff vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization..master`. The `master` branch contains commit `4c6c850f` (upstream sync) which introduced **15 new hardcoded English strings** across 6 files. The localization branch (`vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization`) already has i18n infrastructure from [ZAI-75](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-75)–[ZAI-119](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-119) but is missing the `4c6c850f` upstream sync commit.

---

## Delta Matrix — New Hardcoded Strings in 4c6c850f

### Namespace: `issues.json` → section `row` (2 new keys)

| Key | EN value | DE translation | Source file |
|-----|----------|----------------|-------------|
| `row.planning_mode` | `"Planning"` | `"Planung"` | IssueRow.tsx |
| `row.planning_mode_title` | `"This issue is in planning mode."` | `"Dieses Ticket befindet sich im Planungsmodus."` | IssueRow.tsx, IssueDetail.tsx |

### Namespace: `issues.json` → section `dialog` (2 new keys)

| Key | EN value | DE translation | Source file |
|-----|----------|----------------|-------------|
| `dialog.work_mode_standard` | `"Standard"` | `"Standard"` | NewIssueDialog.tsx |
| `dialog.work_mode_planning` | `"Planning"` | `"Planung"` | NewIssueDialog.tsx |

### Namespace: `issues.json` → section `chat` (8 new keys)

| Key | EN value | DE translation | Source file |
|-----|----------|----------------|-------------|
| `chat.work_mode_planning_badge` | `"Planning"` | `"Planung"` | IssueChatThread.tsx |
| `chat.work_mode_switch_to_standard` | `"Switch to standard"` | `"Zu Standard wechseln"` | IssueChatThread.tsx |
| `chat.work_mode_switch_to_planning` | `"Switch to planning"` | `"Zu Planung wechseln"` | IssueChatThread.tsx |
| `chat.work_mode_planning_on_tooltip` | `"Planning mode is on for this submission. Click to switch to Standard."` | `"Planungsmodus ist für diese Einreichung aktiv. Klicken, um zu Standard zu wechseln."` | IssueChatThread.tsx |
| `chat.no_additional_details` | `"No additional details."` | `"Keine weiteren Details."` | IssueChatThread.tsx |
| `chat.stale_disposition_warning` | `"Stale disposition warning"` | `"Warnung: veralteter Dispositionsstatus"` | IssueChatThread.tsx |
| `chat.attach_file` | `"Attach file"` | `"Datei anhängen"` | IssueChatThread.tsx |
| `chat.more_composer_options` | `"More composer options"` | `"Weitere Optionen"` | IssueChatThread.tsx |

> **Note:** `chat.attach_image` ("Attach image" / "Bild anhängen") was renamed to `chat.attach_file` in #5355. The old key should be kept or aliased until the localization branch merges.

### Namespace: `issues.json` → section `chat` (workspace change sub-keys, 2 new)

| Key | EN value | DE translation | Source file |
|-----|----------|----------------|-------------|
| `chat.workspace_change_label` | `"Workspace"` | `"Arbeitsbereich"` | IssueChatThread.tsx |
| `chat.workspace_change_text` | `"Workspace: {{from}} → {{to}}"` | `"Arbeitsbereich: {{from}} → {{to}}"` | issue-chat-messages.ts |
| `chat.workspace_fallback` | `"None"` | `"Keine"` | issue-timeline-events.ts, issue-chat-messages.ts |

> **Note:** `chat.workspace_fallback` and `chat.none` may overlap — `chat.none` = "Keine" already exists in DE locale. Reuse `chat.none` for the workspace fallback to avoid duplication.

### Namespace: `common.json` → section `sidebar_company` (2 new keys)

| Key | EN value | DE translation | Source file |
|-----|----------|----------------|-------------|
| `sidebar_company.edit_order` | `"Edit"` | `"Bearbeiten"` | SidebarCompanyMenu.tsx |
| `sidebar_company.done_editing_order` | `"Done"` | `"Fertig"` | SidebarCompanyMenu.tsx |

> **Note:** `common.actions.edit` = "Edit" / "Bearbeiten" already exists. Consider reusing it for `edit_order` to avoid duplication. `done_editing_order` needs a new key since `common.status.done` = "Done" / "Fertig" carries a status meaning, not a "finish editing" action.

---

## Files with NO New Hardcoded Strings in 4c6c850f

- **CompanyRail.tsx** — no new strings (pre-existing `company_rail.add_company` unchanged)
- **IssueProperties.tsx** — only non-string changes (formatDateTime calls added)
- **DialogContext.tsx** — no UI string changes
- **LiveUpdatesProvider.tsx** — no new user-visible strings (internal query invalidation only)
- **Routines.tsx** — no new strings in 4c6c850f (existing i18n from ZAI-84 intact)
- **Inbox.tsx** — no new strings in 4c6c850f (existing i18n from ZAI-92 intact)
- **Layout.tsx** — no new strings in 4c6c850f (existing i18n from ZAI-84 intact)

---

## Summary

- **New locale keys needed:** 15 (across `issues.json` and `common.json`)
- **Files affected:** IssueRow.tsx, NewIssueDialog.tsx, IssueChatThread.tsx, IssueDetail.tsx, issue-chat-messages.ts, issue-timeline-events.ts, SidebarCompanyMenu.tsx
- **DE translations:** All 15 provided above
- **DE keys requiring QA review:** `chat.stale_disposition_warning` ("Warnung: veralteter Dispositionsstatus" — the term "Disposition" may need domain-specific review), `row.planning_mode_title` (length may overflow badge)
- **Implementation action:** The 15 keys need to be added to `en/issues.json`, `de/issues.json`, and `en/common.json`, `de/common.json` when the upstream sync is merged into the localization branch.

Posting same delta on [ZAI-132](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-132) now.
